# Dynamic React Business Forms

> A React library for rendering complex, configuration-driven forms with a built-in business rules engine. Define forms as JSON configurations and the library handles rendering, validation, auto-save, and field interactions automatically. UI-library agnostic -- works with Fluent UI, MUI, or any React component library. Published as three packages: `@bghcore/dynamic-forms-core` (engine + orchestration), `@bghcore/dynamic-forms-fluent` (Fluent UI v9 adapter), and `@bghcore/dynamic-forms-mui` (Material UI adapter).

The library centers on four key concepts: a **declarative business rules engine** that evaluates field dependencies, visibility, required state, and computed values from JSON config; a **component injection system** where UI field implementations are registered by string key and rendered via `React.cloneElement`; **pluggable registries** for custom sync/async validation and value functions referenced by name in field configs; and **i18n support** via a locale registry with partial overrides and English fallback. v1.3.0 adds per-field error boundaries, save reliability (AbortController + retry), accessibility (focus trap, ARIA live regions, focus-to-first-error), draft persistence to localStorage, theming via CSS custom properties and render props, a DevTools panel, JSON Schema import, and lazy field registry for code splitting.

## Docs

- [README.md](https://github.com/bghcore/dynamic-react-business-forms/blob/main/README.md): Full usage guide with quick start, field types, architecture diagram, and examples
- [CLAUDE.md](https://github.com/bghcore/dynamic-react-business-forms/blob/main/CLAUDE.md): Detailed architecture, rendering pipeline, key directories, and coding conventions
- [docs/creating-an-adapter.md](https://github.com/bghcore/dynamic-react-business-forms/blob/main/docs/creating-an-adapter.md): Guide for building custom UI library adapters
- [packages/core/llms.txt](https://github.com/bghcore/dynamic-react-business-forms/blob/main/packages/core/llms.txt): Core package API reference for LLMs
- [packages/fluent/llms.txt](https://github.com/bghcore/dynamic-react-business-forms/blob/main/packages/fluent/llms.txt): Fluent UI adapter API reference for LLMs
- [packages/mui/llms.txt](https://github.com/bghcore/dynamic-react-business-forms/blob/main/packages/mui/llms.txt): MUI adapter API reference for LLMs

## Packages

### @bghcore/dynamic-forms-core

UI-library agnostic engine built for React. Depends only on `react` and `react-hook-form`.

- **Providers**: `BusinessRulesProvider`, `InjectedHookFieldProvider` -- React context providers that must wrap the form tree (memoized)
- **Components**: `HookInlineForm` (entry point, save with AbortController/retry/timeout), `HookInlineFormFields`, `HookRenderField` (useMemo, async validation wired), `HookFieldWrapper` (React.memo, render props for theming), `HookConfirmInputsModal` (focus trap), `HookWizardForm` (multi-step wizard, step announcements), `HookFieldArray` (repeating sections), `HookFormErrorBoundary` (per-field crash isolation), `HookFormDevTools` (dev-only debugging panel)
- **Business Rules**: `ProcessAllBusinessRules`, `ProcessFieldBusinessRule`, `CombineBusinessRules`, `GetDefaultBusinessRules`, `normalizeFieldConfig`
- **Validation**: 15 built-in sync validators + `registerAsyncValidations()` for server-side checks. Factory functions: `createMinLengthValidation`, `createMaxLengthValidation`, `createNumericRangeValidation`, `createPatternValidation`, `createRequiredIfValidation`
- **Config Validation**: `validateFieldConfigs()` -- dev-mode checks for missing deps, unregistered components/validators, circular deps
- **Cycle Detection**: `detectDependencyCycles()`, `validateDependencyGraph()` -- Kahn's algorithm on dependency graphs
- **i18n**: `registerLocale()`, `getLocaleString()`, `resetLocale()` -- partial locale overrides with English fallback
- **Wizard**: `getVisibleSteps()`, `getStepFields()`, `validateStepFields()`, `isStepValid()`, `getStepIndex()`
- **Registries**: `registerValidations()`, `registerAsyncValidations()`, `registerValueFunctions()` -- plug in custom functions by name
- **Hooks**: `useDraftPersistence()` (auto-save to localStorage, recover on mount), `useBeforeUnload()` (browser warning on unsaved changes)
- **Serialization**: `serializeFormState()`, `deserializeFormState()` -- Date-safe JSON round-trip
- **Schema Import**: `jsonSchemaToFieldConfig()` -- convert JSON Schema to `Dictionary<IFieldConfig>`
- **Lazy Loading**: `createLazyFieldRegistry()` -- React.lazy field registry for code splitting
- **Theming**: CSS custom properties (`--hook-form-error-color`, etc.) via optional `styles.css`, render props on `HookFieldWrapper`
- **Accessibility**: Focus trap in modals, focus-to-first-error, ARIA live regions, wizard step announcements
- **Types**: `IFieldConfig`, `IBusinessRule`, `IHookFieldSharedProps<T>`, `IWizardConfig`, `IFieldArrayConfig`, `ICoreLocaleStrings`, `IDropdownOption`, `ComponentTypes`, `IHookFormDevToolsProps`, `IDraftPersistenceOptions`, `IJsonSchema`, `IJsonSchemaProperty`

### @bghcore/dynamic-forms-fluent

Fluent UI v9 adapter. Provides 19 field components (13 editable + 6 read-only).

- **Registry**: `createFluentFieldRegistry()` -- returns a complete field map for `InjectedHookFieldProvider`
- **Editable Fields**: HookTextbox, HookDropdown, HookToggle, HookNumber, HookMultiSelect, HookDateControl, HookSlider, HookSimpleDropdown, HookMultiSelectSearch, HookPopOutEditor, HookDocumentLinks, HookStatusDropdown, HookFragment
- **Read-Only Fields**: HookReadOnly, HookReadOnlyArray, HookReadOnlyDateTime, HookReadOnlyCumulativeNumber, HookReadOnlyRichText, HookReadOnlyWithButton

### @bghcore/dynamic-forms-mui

Material UI (MUI) adapter. Provides 19 field components (13 editable + 6 read-only).

- **Registry**: `createMuiFieldRegistry()` -- returns a complete field map for `InjectedHookFieldProvider`
- **Editable Fields**: HookTextbox, HookDropdown, HookToggle, HookNumber, HookMultiSelect, HookDateControl, HookSlider, HookSimpleDropdown, HookMultiSelectSearch, HookPopOutEditor, HookDocumentLinks, HookStatusDropdown, HookFragment
- **Read-Only Fields**: HookReadOnly, HookReadOnlyArray, HookReadOnlyDateTime, HookReadOnlyCumulativeNumber, HookReadOnlyRichText, HookReadOnlyWithButton

## Examples

### Minimal Setup (Fluent UI)

```tsx
import { BusinessRulesProvider, InjectedHookFieldProvider, UseInjectedHookFieldContext, HookInlineForm } from "@bghcore/dynamic-forms-core";
import { createFluentFieldRegistry } from "@bghcore/dynamic-forms-fluent";

function FieldRegistrar({ children }) {
  const { setInjectedFields } = UseInjectedHookFieldContext();
  useEffect(() => setInjectedFields(createFluentFieldRegistry()), []);
  return <>{children}</>;
}

<BusinessRulesProvider>
  <InjectedHookFieldProvider>
    <FieldRegistrar>
      <HookInlineForm
        configName="myForm"
        programName="myApp"
        fieldConfigs={{ name: { component: "Textbox", label: "Name", required: true } }}
        defaultValues={{ name: "" }}
        saveData={async (data) => data}
      />
    </FieldRegistrar>
  </InjectedHookFieldProvider>
</BusinessRulesProvider>
```

### Swap to MUI (one import change)

```tsx
import { createMuiFieldRegistry } from "@bghcore/dynamic-forms-mui";
setInjectedFields(createMuiFieldRegistry()); // that's it
```

### Business Rules

```tsx
const fieldConfigs = {
  type: {
    component: "Dropdown",
    label: "Type",
    dropdownOptions: [{ key: "bug", text: "Bug" }, { key: "feature", text: "Feature" }],
    dependencies: {
      bug: { severity: { required: true, hidden: false } },
      feature: { severity: { hidden: true } },
    },
  },
  severity: { component: "Dropdown", label: "Severity", hidden: true },
};
```

### Async Validation

```tsx
import { registerAsyncValidations } from "@bghcore/dynamic-forms-core";

registerAsyncValidations({
  CheckUniqueEmail: async (value, entityData, signal) => {
    const res = await fetch(`/api/check?email=${value}`, { signal });
    const { exists } = await res.json();
    return exists ? "Already in use" : undefined;
  },
});

// In field config: asyncValidations: ["CheckUniqueEmail"]
```

### i18n

```tsx
import { registerLocale } from "@bghcore/dynamic-forms-core";
registerLocale({ required: "Obligatoire", save: "Sauvegarder" });
```

### Wizard

```tsx
import { HookWizardForm } from "@bghcore/dynamic-forms-core";

<HookWizardForm
  wizardConfig={{
    steps: [
      { id: "basics", title: "Basics", fields: ["name", "type"] },
      { id: "details", title: "Details", fields: ["description"], visibleWhen: { fieldName: "type", values: ["bug"] } },
    ],
    validateOnStepChange: true,
  }}
  entityData={formValues}
  renderStepContent={(fields) => <FieldRenderer fields={fields} />}
  renderStepNavigation={({ goNext, goPrev, canGoNext, canGoPrev }) => (
    <nav>
      <button onClick={goPrev} disabled={!canGoPrev}>Back</button>
      <button onClick={goNext} disabled={!canGoNext}>Next</button>
    </nav>
  )}
/>
```
